name: Zota Health Care Limited
summary: Zota Health Care Limited manufactures and markets pharmaceutical products in India. The company offers generic drugs, OTC pharmaceutical products, ayurvedic products, and nutraceutical products. As of December 30, 2020, it operated 491 retail stores under the DAVAINDIA name in 21 states of India. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Surat, India.
